Package de.uka.ilkd.key.scripts.meta

@NullMarked package de.uka.ilkd.key.scripts.meta

Package holds utillities for working with proof script arguments. The main functinoality is an injector, which maps named and positional arguments given in ScriptCommandAst into JavaBeans. This includes correct type conversions.

  • Use Flag to mark a boolean flag.
  • Use Option to mark a key-value argument.
  • Use Argument to mark a positional argument.
  • Use PositionalVarargs to catch-all positional arguments.
  • Use OptionalVarargs to catch-all key-value arguments with a specific prefix.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.scripts
    Proof script commands are a simple proof automation facility.

    Description
    Argument
    Annotation for marking positional arguments of parameter classes.
    ArgumentRequiredException
    Signals if an argument is required but was not set during an injection.
    ArgumentsLifter
     
    ConversionException
    This exception signals that the conversion to the required data type could not be applied.
    Converter<R,T>
    A Converter translates an instance of R to an instance of T.
    Documentation
    This annotation is used for documenting proof script commands or arguments.
    Flag
    An annotation for marking flag (boolean) arguments of proof script commands.
    InjectionException
     
    InjectionReflectionException
     
    NoSpecifiedConverterException
    Indicates a missing converter.
    Option
    This annotation marks key-value arguments in proof scripts parameter classes.
    OptionalVarargs
    This annotation marks a catch-all parameter for key-value arguments.
    PositionalVarargs
     
    ProofScriptArgument

    This class captures the meta data about parameters of
